Home / Services / Fire Pit Installation

Fire Pit Installation

Cozy fire pits for year-round enjoyment.

Extend your outdoor season with a custom-built fire pit. We design and install fire pits that create a warm and inviting atmosphere in your backyard. Our fire pits are built with durable, weather-resistant materials that can withstand the elements, ensuring long-term performance. We offer a variety of styles, including wood-burning, gas-burning, and propane-burning fire pits, and we can help you choose the best option for your needs and preferences. Our fire pit installation process includes careful site preparation, proper ventilation, and expert craftsmanship to ensure a safe and enjoyable experience. We can also incorporate seating areas and landscaping to create a complete outdoor living space. Whether you're looking for a simple fire pit for roasting marshmallows or a grand fire pit for entertaining guests, we have the expertise to deliver exceptional results. We are familiar with Columbus's building codes and regulations, ensuring that your fire pit is built in compliance with all applicable standards. We are committed to providing you with a fire pit that is both beautiful and functional, adding warmth and ambiance to your outdoor space for years to come. We understand the importance of proper safety precautions, and we take meticulous care to ensure that your fire pit is built to the highest safety standards.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Design consultation to determine the best location and style.
  2. 02 Step 2: Site preparation, including excavation and leveling.
  3. 03 Step 3: Construction of the fire pit using durable materials.
  4. 04 Step 4: Installation of gas lines or propane tanks (if applicable).

Benefits

  • Extended outdoor season
  • Warm and inviting atmosphere
  • Increased property value
  • Perfect for entertaining

Frequently Asked Questions

What is the best material for a fire pit?

Natural stone and concrete blocks are popular choices for fire pits due to their durability and heat resistance.

Do I need a permit for a fire pit?

A permit may be required for a fire pit, depending on the size and location of the fire pit. We can assist you with the permit application process.

What safety precautions should I take when using a fire pit?

Always keep a fire extinguisher or water hose nearby, never leave a fire unattended, and keep children and pets at a safe distance.
